summary: This is a brief promotional post where Cathy O'Neil shares media coverage of her upcoming book 'Weapons of Math Destruction.' She highlights a Time Magazine piece written by Rana Foroohar, whom she had previously interviewed on Slate Money about Foroohar's book on finance. She also mentions being profiled as a 'math nerd' by Bloomberg.
key_points: Time Magazine published a piece about O'Neil's upcoming book 'Weapons of Math Destruction'
The article was written by Rana Foroohar, author of 'Makers and Takers' about finance's negative impact on American business
O'Neil was also profiled by Bloomberg as a 'math nerd' fighting 'big data'
money_quotes: I was profiled as a math nerd
key_insight: A quick announcement sharing mainstream media coverage of O'Neil's work on algorithmic accountability as her book launch approached.
